programmes.show_description: Joyful romance with Chaley Rose. While prepping her inn for the annual Yuletide festival, Averie has an unexpected reunion with her old musical partner. Can they strike the right note together? (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
